description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides. He is dressed in a fitted long-sleeve shirt and tight pants, both of which are plain and unadorned. The figure has a distinct beard and a short, styled haircut with shaved sides. His facial features are angular, and his hands and feet are proportionate to his body. The shoes are simple and cover the entire foot, suggesting practical urban footwear. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for a city or neighborhood environment.
description: A bearded adult male standing upright, wearing a fitted long-sleeve shirt, tight pants, and simple shoes, with a short styled haircut.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, beard, chest, and the front of the shirt and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the side of the shirt and pants, and the arm's relaxed position.
description_view_2: Back view displays the back of the head, shirt, pants, and both arms hanging down.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, the side of the shirt and pants, and the arm's relaxed position.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve shirt and tight pants
attribute_hairstyle: short styled hair with shaved sides
